title: "Stand In Awe, And Sin Not"  Psalm 4:4

notes.introduction: An exposition of Psalm 4:4 on the phrase 'stand in awe and sin not,' tracing a direct correlation between a believer's view of God and the presence and handling of sin in the Christian life. Draws on Isaiah 6, Genesis 39, Romans 7, 1 John 1-2, Proverbs 28:13, and related passages to examine how God is to be viewed, how sin is to be viewed, and how sin is to be dealt with personally.
